message:
fix: cancel in-flight SSE requests on cluster/namespace change (#3250) (#3315)

SSE-based hooks (usePods, useAllPods, usePodIssues, useDeploymentIssues,
useJobs) did not cancel ongoing fetchSSE requests when cluster or namespace
changed. Previous streams continued running and their onClusterData callbacks
updated state with stale data from the old cluster, causing flickering and
race conditions.

Fix: add an AbortController ref to each hook that is aborted before every
new SSE request and on effect cleanup. AbortError is ignored in catch blocks
so it does not count as a failure.

Closes #3250

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
